title: Tempo di villeggiatura
writer: Willie Antuono, Agenore Incrocci, Luigi Magni
actors: Vittorio De Sica, Giovanna Ralli, Marisa Merlini
plot: Holiday time in Corniolo, a resort 40 kilometres from Rome. In a recently opened hotel various characters sojourn and love stories begin and end. Among the hotel guests Carletto, who wants to go to Rome and become an actor and whe...
